/ Design philosophy

Design for me is more than visuals — it's a way to tell stories and solve real problems. I love creating experiences that feel intuitive, emotional, and human. When design works well, people don't notice it — they just enjoy using it.

/ About me

Liliana
Pelyno

Hi! I'm a UI/UX Designer & Illustrator from Lviv, Ukraine. I create human-centered digital experiences that feel intuitive and beautiful. My work lives at the intersection of aesthetics and functionality — where every pixel has a purpose.

When I'm not designing, I'm studying user behavior, sketching concepts, and exploring tools that push creative boundaries.

My Journey

2025 — Present
Freelance UI/UX Designer
Self-employed
